name: gemini-llm-council
description: Gemini CLI Extension to work with multiple LLMs at once. Supports OpenRouter, custom OpenAI-compatible endpoints (with fetch models), and Gemini OAuth for Pro subscription models.

settings.name: OpenRouter API Key
settings.description: Your OpenRouter API key for accessing many models. Get one at https://openrouter.ai/keys

settings.name: Custom OpenAI Base URL
settings.description: Base URL for any OpenAI-compatible endpoint (e.g. https://api.openai.com/v1, https://api.groq.com/openai/v1, http://localhost:11434/v1). Leave empty to disable custom provider.

settings.name: Custom OpenAI API Key
settings.description: API key for the custom OpenAI-compatible endpoint.

settings.name: Gemini API Key (fallback)
settings.description: Optional Google Gemini API key from AI Studio. Used if OAuth not configured. Higher quotas with Pro plan.
